preconditions: Launch browser and navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home
Home page should load successfully before executing test steps

testCases.title: Verify all approved navigation and action buttons are visible on the home page
steps: Open the application home page using URL http://localhost/washtabui/home
Observe the top and main action sections of the page
Verify visibility of Person button, Back button, Notification button, Home button, Customer signup button, Clean survey button, and Site survey button
testCases.expectedResult: All approved buttons are visible, fully rendered, and accessible on the home page without overlap, clipping, hidden state, or UI distortion. No browser or application error is displayed during page load.

testCases.title: Verify user can navigate to login page using the Person button
testCases.expectedResult: The application redirects the user from the home page to the login page and the browser URL changes to http://localhost/washtabui/login?data=undefined. The home page controls are no longer displayed after navigation.

testCases.title: Verify Customer signup button opens the customer-search page
steps: Click the Customer signup button once
testCases.expectedResult: The application navigates away from the home page and opens the customer-search page successfully. The home page action buttons are replaced by the customer-search workflow screen without visible UI errors.

testCases.title: Verify Clean survey button opens the vehicle-survey page
steps: Click the Clean survey button once
testCases.expectedResult: The application navigates successfully to the vehicle-survey page and the home page interface is replaced by the vehicle-survey workflow screen without broken rendering or browser errors.

testCases.title: Verify Site survey button opens the survey page
steps: Click the Site survey button once
testCases.expectedResult: The application navigates successfully to the survey page and the user is no longer on the home page. Navigation completes without loading failures, blank pages, or UI errors.

testCases.title: Verify Home button remains interactive on the home page
testCases.expectedResult: The Home button accepts the click interaction and the application remains stable on the home page without page corruption, browser errors, or disabled UI elements.

testCases.title: Verify Notification button accepts user interaction without application failure
testCases.expectedResult: The Notification button responds to the click event without causing browser crashes, frozen UI, script errors, blank overlays, or unexpected navigation away from the application.

testCases.title: Verify Back button accepts user interaction on the home page
testCases.expectedResult: The Back button responds to the click interaction without causing application crashes, blank screens, broken layouts, or unresponsive behavior.

testCases.title: Verify all approved buttons are enabled and actionable on initial page load
steps: Inspect each approved button displayed on the screen
Verify each button appears enabled and supports pointer interaction
testCases.expectedResult: All approved buttons appear enabled, visually interactive, and selectable. No approved button is displayed in a disabled, hidden, or inactive state on initial page load.

testCases.title: Verify direct navigation to the home URL displays the correct home screen
steps: Enter http://localhost/washtabui/home directly into the browser address bar
Press Enter to load the page
testCases.expectedResult: The browser loads the home page successfully and all approved navigation and action buttons are visible and interactive after the page finishes loading.

testCases.title: Verify home page remains accessible after browser refresh
testCases.expectedResult: The home page reloads successfully and all approved buttons remain visible, enabled, and interactive after the refresh. No session error, blank page, or broken UI component is displayed.

testCases.title: Verify no unexpected navigation occurs without user interaction on the home page
steps: Do not click any button for a reasonable observation period
Observe the current page and URL
testCases.expectedResult: The application remains on the home page throughout the observation period. No automatic redirects, popup windows, unexpected page transitions, or URL changes occur without user interaction.
